name: Basic Egg Pasta (Italian)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup semolina flour or additional all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour and salt in a mound on a clean work surface.
2. Make a well in the center and add the eggs.
3. Using a fork, gradually incorporate the flour into the eggs, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Add water if the dough is too dry to achieve a soft, pliable consistency.
5. Gather the dough into a ball and knead for 5-10 minutes.
6. Cover with a damp cloth or place in an airtight plastic bag; let rest for 30 minutes (dough can also be prepared in a food processor).
7. Roll out the dough by hand or using a handheld pasta machine to cut desired shapes.
8. Bring a large pot of water to a rolling boil.
9. Add the fresh pasta and cook until it floats to the surface (a few minutes).
10. Taste for doneness; the pasta should be cooked but still retain some firmness.
11. Drain well and pat with butter to prevent sticking. Serve immediately with your preferred sauce.
